C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\QuEST.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\QuEST.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\QuEST.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -o libQuEST.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libQuEST.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,4,--minor-image-version,2 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\QuEST.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\QuEST.dir\linkLibs.rsp
